title: rubus eriostachys
intro: Rubus eriostachys, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Indian raspberry, is a plant species in the rose family (Rosaceae). It is a perennial shrub native to the Himalayan region, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Rubus eriostachys is often used as a tea, tincture, or dried root extract, and is considered a valuable resource for its potential to prevent and treat various diseases.
